property.name: useRelativeMaxHeight
property.label: Limit Height (Relative to screen)
property.description: Force table height to 60% of the vertical screen space. To set a custom percentage, use this in conjunction with Custom Relative Max Height

property.name: customRelativeMaxHeight
property.label: Custom Relative Max Height
property.description: Set custom max height (0-100) relative to the vertical screen space. Limit Height must first be enabled.
